path_top.label: 90分钟1-0，Germany常规时间晋级。
path_top.label_en: After a 1-0 scoreline in 90 minutes, Germany advances in normal time.
path_top.summary_en: After a 1-0 scoreline in 90 minutes, Germany advances in normal time.

path_top.label: 90分钟1-1后进入加时，加时增量1-0，Germany加时晋级。

path_top.label_en: After 1-1 in 90 minutes, the match goes to extra time; Germany advances with a 1-0 extra-time increment.
path_top.summary_en: After 1-1 in 90 minutes, the match goes to extra time; Germany advances with a 1-0 extra-time increment.

path_top.label: 90分钟1-1、加时0-0后仍平，Germany点球晋级。
path_top.label_en: After 1-1 in 90 minutes and a 0-0 extra-time increment, the match remains level; Germany advances on penalties.
path_top.summary_en: After 1-1 in 90 minutes and a 0-0 extra-time increment, the match remains level; Germany advances on penalties.
